backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the portfolio backend, defining data types and persistent stores for blog posts, projects, skills, leads, testimonials, services, SEO settings, and social links, along with admin claim/check logic and CRUD methods protected by access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature requiring a deep audit and rewrite of AdminGuard and the backend claimAdmin/checkAdminStatus flow, listing the affected frontend files and associated test ID REQ-35.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to one-sentence summaries describing each file's role and notable fixes, covering pages, hooks, and components across the admin and public sections.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router tree with a public layout (nav/footer) and an admin layout (no nav/footer) as separate nested route groups, registering all public and admin page routes and wrapping the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity auth state, actor fetch status, and admin query result before rendering children; shows a loading spinner during any pending check, a login prompt when unauthenticated, a 'Claim Admin Access' button when no admin exists, or an 'Access Denied' message when another admin is already registered.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Renders the admin panel sidebar with navigation links, active-state highlighting, logout functionality, and a responsive mobile drawer with overlay.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with branding, dynamic social links fetched from the backend, quick navigation links, and contact information.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the shared Navigation and Footer components inside a full-height flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Provides an Internet Identity login/logout button that invalidates relevant React Query caches on authentication state changes.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop links and a mobile hamburger menu, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Shows a modal dialog prompting newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to create a profile.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Imperatively updates the document title and meta description tag based on per-page SEO settings fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Button that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes, displaying a sun or moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions, including CRUD operations for user profiles, admin management, testimonials, blog posts, projects, services, skills, leads, SEO settings, and social links.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, charts) along with reusable utility component classes like glow effects and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` for React Query and `InternetIdentityProvider` for authentication wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page displaying Boby Dhorajiya's profile, bio, stats, core values, and work history with links to other sections of the portfolio site.
Admin page for managing blog posts with full CRUD operations, pagination, search, and a form supporting title, slug, meta fields, and content, guarded by admin authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CategoriesManag: Admin page for managing project categories with create, edit, delete, search, and pagination functionality, protected by an admin authentication guard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying stat cards for projects, leads, blog posts, skills, and categories with links to each management section, protected by an admin authentication guard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Help.tsx: Admin help page providing step-by-step guides for managing projects, categories, skills, and other portfolio sections, rendered as numbered instruction sections with icons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsManagement: Admin page for viewing and deleting contact form leads, with search, pagination, and an admin guard that restricts access to authenticated admins.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectsManagem: Admin page for creating, editing, and deleting portfolio projects, supporting image upload, category assignment, URL, and paginated search, guarded by admin authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SeoManagement.t: Admin page for managing per-page SEO settings (meta title and description), with add/edit/delete functionality, a predefined page selector, and admin access guard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServicesManagem: Admin page for managing offered services with title and description fields, supporting add, edit, delete, search, and pagination behind an admin guard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SkillsManagemen: Admin page for managing skills with name, years of experience, and category (primary/secondary/security/additional), supporting CRUD operations, search, and pagination behind an admin guard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SocialLinksMana: Admin page for managing social media links with full CRUD operations, search, pagination, and an inline form for creating/editing links by platform, URL, and icon. Includes an AdminGuard component that restricts access to authenticated admin users.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Admin page for managing testimonials with add, edit, delete, search, and pagination functionality. Includes a reusable TestimonialForm component and an AdminGuard for access control.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays all blog posts from the backend, showing title, description, and date, with navigation to individual post pages.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Individual blog post page that fetches a post by slug and renders its title, metadata, date, and full content, with a fallback for missing posts.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a form (name, email, message) that submits via the `useProcessContactForm` mutation hook, displaying toast notifications on success or error, alongside static contact info (email, location, availability).
frontend/src/pages/Experience.tsx: Static Experience page displaying a single timeline entry for a Senior Mobile App Developer role at Nexus IT Solution (2022–Present), listing key responsibilities and achievements.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home landing page featuring a hero section, tech stack display, animated sections, social links fetched from the backend, and an FAQ accordion, with scroll-based reveal animations.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: Simple 404 Not Found page with a large '404' display, a short message, and a link back to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Projects page that fetches projects and categories from the backend, supports category-based filtering via tab buttons, and renders a responsive grid of project cards with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page that attempts to load services from the backend and falls back to a static list of seven predefined services (Flutter, React Native, security, etc.) if none are returned, with an SEO head component included.
frontend/src/pages/Skills.tsx: Displays a grouped skills page fetched via `useGetSkills`, organizing skills into four categories (primary, secondary, security, additional) with progress bars and loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a testimonials page that fetches and displays client reviews in a card grid with star ratings, handling loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, sidebar, cyan, navy, chart), border radius variables, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 11) documenting the portfolio site's implemented features, architectural decisions (React frontend, Node/Express backend, MySQL, ICP Internet Identity), known issues, and security hardening applied across the codebase.
